title: Preserve zone colors on collapsed representatives
description: When a zone is collapsed into an abstraction component, keep the original zone color on the representative node and its outgoing edges.
decision_notes: Collapsed zone definitions remain in the projected model as color sources.
Collapsed zone area boxes are filtered from rendered zone box groups so the zone reads as closed.
Zone abstraction nodes use their own zone id as resolvedZone, which lets overview color styling apply the original zone palette to the node and outgoing edges.
verification: Browser check at http://127.0.0.1:4174/: closing gcp produced a zone:gcp abstraction node with GCP zone style and outgoing edges with the same stroke/label color.
